passives.name: Bitter Cold
passives.effects: Dealing [[ability damage]] to an enemy that is at or below {{as|50% of their '''maximum''' health}} {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 30% for 1 second.

effects_structured.raw: Ability damage to enemies at or below 50% max health slows them by 30% for 1 second.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified trigger gating against page-level source: slow applies when ability damage resolves on targets at or below 50% maximum health.
